title: alcea lavateriflora
intro: Alcea lavateriflora, also known as the Lavatera plant, is a perennial flowering plant native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Alcea lavateriflora include its ability to treat fever, sore throat, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Alcea lavateriflora can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal properties.
